english: bright red / vivid red / luminous red
notes: Adverbial phrase combining the present participle 'leuchtend' (glowing/vivid) with the adjective 'rot'. Used to intensify the colour red, similar to 'knallrot' or 'feuerrot'. 'Leuchtend' can be used with other colours too (leuchtend blau, leuchtend grün).

sentences.german: Die Rosen im Garten sind leuchtend rot.
sentences.english: The roses in the garden are bright red.
